name: Outright
short_description: This is 2D Platformer with RPG elements. The character has various acrobatic and fighting skills. Combine them wisely for best efficiency. Crush the enemies, take their souls and transform it to new abilities.
detailed_description:
It is a 2D, linear, sprite platformer with RPG elements.

Features


The character has a different moveset that, when combined wisely, can achieve high efficiency.

Combat moves
  • Melee attack
  • Range attack
  • Parry
  • Stomp
Acrobatic moves
  • Jump
  • Double jump
  • Wall jump
  • Dash

The game has a minor element of RPG designed as upgrades, which are gained for points knocked out of enemies.

Upgrades
  • Increasing maximum amount of health points and energy cartridges
  • Healing (both active and passive)
  • Several types of projectiles

You can only upgrade between levels.
The game can be played without upgrades, but this will significantly increase the difficulty during the playing.
